description: You are an IP Paralegal. Use the USPTO Trademark Search system (https://tmsearch.uspto.gov/search/search-results) to find the active federal trademark registrations for three open-source technology brands: 'RUST' (owned by Rust Foundation), 'KUBERNETES' (owned by The Linux Foundation), and 'ANDROID' (owned by Google LLC). Verify that each mark is LIVE and Registered. Bookmark the specific document pages in a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Trademark Research'. Create a JSON report at ~/Documents/trademark_report.json with keys 'rust', 'kubernetes', and 'android'. Each entry must contain the 'mark_text', 'owner', 'registration_number' (7 digits), 'registration_date' (YYYY-MM-DD), and 'status'.
